data.title: AutoLeap Introduces the First AI Receptionist for Auto Shops: AutoLeap AIR
data.description: AutoLeap, a prominent provider of shop management software, has introduced AutoLeap AIR, the automotive industry's inaugural AI-based receptionist.

data.title: ALWAYS BEST CARE EXPANDS SENIOR CARE SERVICES WITH NEW LOCATION IN CINCINNATI
data.description: Compassionate in-home care and senior living support are now more accessible to families in Rocklin, California, with the launch of a new office by Always Best Care Senior Services. This leading provider of non-medical in-home senior care and assisted living referral services unveiled the new location on April 28, 2026. The initiative aims to cater to the growing demand for elderly care services in the region and offer support to families in need. This development is a significant step towards ensuring the well-being of seniors in Rocklin, with the new office poised to serve a large number of individuals seeking quality care and living options for their elderly loved ones.

data.title: Growing Together: Life Time Foundation's Enduring Commitment to a Thriving, Healthy Planet
data.description: In the spirit of Earth Month, a significant milestone was reached with over $3 million in grants awarded since late 2023, showcasing a long-term dedication to supporting communities, revitalizing ecosystems, and safeguarding natural spaces. Noteworthy results include the Life Time Foundation's contributions towards tree planting initiatives and conservation efforts.

data.title: TEAMSTERS AT DIVERSIFIED TRANSPORTATION SECURE FIRST CONTRACT
data.description: 114 motorcoach operators at Diversified Transportation in Winnemucca, Nevada, successfully negotiated for improved wages and benefits. The group, a part of Student Transportation of America, organized and secured their initial contract after a period of negotiation. This win signifies a significant achievement for the workers and highlights the importance of collective bargaining in securing better working conditions.
GOLD FELL SHARPLY TOWARD $4,595 AN OUNCE AS THE US-IRAN DEADLOCK OVER THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ KEPT ENERGY SUPPLY RISKS HIGH AND PRESSURED BULLION.

data.title: MES Inc. Positions Global Sourcing Network to Support Manufacturers Affected by Pace Industries Die Casting Closures
data.description: An Ohio supply chain partner has recently increased its die casting program capacity amid a downturn in the North American aluminum die casting market. MES Inc., a worldwide supply chain management company catering to top industrial manufacturers, shared the news from Lewis Center, Ohio on April 28, 2026. The expansion comes at a crucial time as the market in North America is experiencing a contraction. This development underscores MES Inc.'s commitment to meeting the rising demand for die casting services in the region.

data.title: Labubu Dolls may unlawfully use cotton from Xinjiang, China in clothing, as per a test by NYT. US bans such cotton.
data.description: A recent examination conducted by The New York Times revealed that certain garments for viral dolls were made using cotton sourced from the Xinjiang region in China. This type of cotton is prohibited in the United States due to human rights concerns.

data.title: WeatherPromise Named to TIME100 Most Influential Companies: Industry Leaders The list recognizes the world's most influential brands for their impact, innovation, and achievement
data.description: Today, WeatherPromise, a renowned global brand providing assurance for worry-free travel regardless of weather conditions, received recognition by being included in the TIME100 Most Influential Companies Industry Leaders list. This acknowledgment underscores WeatherPromise's significance in the industry and its impact on ensuring seamless travel experiences.

data.title: U-BX Technology Ltd. Announces Closing of $4.55 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: In Beijing, China, on April 28, 2026, U-BX Technology Ltd. (NASDAQ: UBXG) revealed the successful completion of its registered direct offering with multiple investors. The offering involved the sale and purchase of 15,166,668 Units of the Company's securities at a combined cost of $0.30 per Unit in the registered direct offering. Each Unit comprises one Class A ordinary share valued at $0.0016 per share and one warrant permitting the purchase of 0.3 of a Class A Ordinary Share. U-BX Technology Ltd. specializes in delivering AI-driven value-added services to businesses in the insurance sector, such as insurance carriers and brokers.

data.title: Amazon Earnings Preview: AI Momentum In Focus, But This Number Could Be 'Messy'
data.description: The popularity of Amazon's stock is increasing as the tech company gets ready to disclose its first-quarter earnings on Wednesday. The focus will be on the momentum of their artificial intelligence technology. However, analysts predict that a particular figure in the report might be challenging to interpret.

data.title: MYR Stock Hits A Record High Amid Sizzling Profit And Sales Growth
data.description: On Tuesday, the IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating of MYR Group increased significantly from 94 to 99. This surge comes as MYR Group's stock achieves a record high amidst remarkable profit and sales growth.

data.title: Piramal Pharma Limited Announces Results for Q4 and Full-year FY26
data.description: In Mumbai, India, Piramal Pharma Limited, a prominent global pharmaceutical, health, and wellness corporation, disclosed its financial outcomes for the Fourth Quarter(Q4) and Full-year ended on March 31, 2026. The company's stocks (NSE: PPLPHARMA | BSE: 543635) were showcased during the announcement.

data.title: CORRECTION -- Product Recall: PC® Cola
data.description: In Brampton, Ontario, on April 28, 2026, Loblaw Companies Limited has issued a voluntary recall for specific cases of PC® Cola (12 x 355 ML) with the UPC 060383787035 due to precautionary measures.

data.title: OpenAI falls behind on user and revenue targets, sparking concerns about its AI leadership in the industry. #AI #technology
data.description: The leading artificial intelligence company has supposedly failed to meet its projected user and revenue goals. This setback has cast doubt on its plans for data center expansion and initial public offering.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Wirex/
data.description: On April 8, 2026, Wirex, in collaboration with Utorg, announced an update regarding their crypto-to-card spending service for over 2 million users globally. The Wirex Banking as a Service (BaaS) now offers seamless transactions for users looking to convert cryptocurrencies to traditional card payments.
